meaning: n.有背的长凳vt.安放,使定居,安排,解决,决定,整理,支付,使平静vi.安家,定居,停留,下陷,沉淀,决定,澄清
examples: It's time to settle this mano-a-mano.
She had decided to settle permanently in France.
Still, the mere threat of a jackpot award makes defendants (or their insurers) eager to settle.
You'll get a booth seat if you're lucky, but might have to settle for a simple stool.
